## Change summary

Describe the behavior and architecture affected by this change.

## Verification

- [ ] `bash scripts/quality.sh local` passes.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior and negative/security paths.
- [ ] Module boundaries and public API changes are intentional.
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary, maintained, and reviewed.
- [ ] No generated, vendored, credential, or local-environment files are included.

## Suppressions and exceptions

List every new static-analysis, nullness, vulnerability, architecture, coverage, or
mutation-testing suppression and explain why fixing the underlying issue is not the
safer choice. Write `None` when this change adds no suppressions.
